name: characters
description: Multi-user web utility for SillyTavern character management with Nextcloud-backed storage

scripts.dev: bun run --cwd server native:ensure && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "bun run --cwd server dev" "bun run --cwd client dev"
scripts.dev:api: bun run --cwd server native:ensure && bun run --cwd server dev
scripts.build: bun run --cwd server build && bun run --cwd client build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd server type-check && bun run --cwd client type-check
